# The Mat

> The Mat is North Georgia's members-only indoor golf simulator club in Gainesville / Hall County. One private big-room bay, open 24/7. Currently pre-launch and capturing founding members.

## About
- Location: Gainesville, Hall County, North Georgia
- Phone: (770) 618-9393
- Format: A single, private, pro-grade indoor golf simulator bay ("the room") — booked by the block or accessed anytime as a member. Not a multi-bay arcade.
- Access: 24/7 via app unlock + QR door access for members.
- Status: Pre-launch. Opening Fall 2026 (date TBD).

## Founding offer
- Founding memberships are open now (limited spots).
- The founding membership rate is announced August 1, 2026.
- Founding members lock the special rate for their first month; reserving now is free (email only).

## Membership types (pricing announced Aug 1)
- The Membership — unlimited-style member access to the room.
- The Day Pass — one-off block, ideal for date nights.
- Corporate & Groups — private buyouts for companies, teams, schools, and parties.

## Key pages
- / — home / founding-member signup
- /memberships — membership info (launching)
- /book — booking (launching)
- /gift-cards, /shop, /gallery, /reviews — launching

## Contact
- Reserve a founding spot: submit email on the home page.
- Phone: (770) 618-9393
